subcodes.first_line: O wronged one of that land! Indeed, circumstances have become most difficult for those oppressed souls, for a group bereft of honor and dignity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مظلوم آن اقلیم فی الحقیقه کار بر آن مظلومان تنگ شده زیرا جمعی بی نام و ننگ
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
